creator: jharris@widomaker.com
text:
The .sig I've found on the majority of the mirrors has these hashes:

  -SHA256 (gnupg-1.4.20.tar.bz2.sig) = 9458921ce855f7fef88f0ae2bb1f2033bfbc83857104d8b5592f40c84d1a2f98
  -SIZE (gnupg-1.4.20.tar.bz2.sig) = 287
  +MD5 (gnupg-1.4.20.tar.bz2.sig) = 289d60899ada86e0a341860d7824aed2
  +SHA1 (gnupg-1.4.20.tar.bz2.sig) = cce0a6927bc540560240e05318a511faf946d761
  +RMD160 (gnupg-1.4.20.tar.bz2.sig) = 0355ed4bda1244864e095ffce9f3d707a2f1d9cd
  +SHA256 (gnupg-1.4.20.tar.bz2.sig) = 60699efc9c9546722c04aba69fff874aaf5dacd7d4637238cb8d66960963f843
  +SIZE (gnupg-1.4.20.tar.bz2.sig) = 574

and the port fails the 'make checksum' step with the following distinfo:

  Path: distinfo
  Name: distinfo
  Working Copy Root Path: /usr/ports
  URL: https://svn0.us-east.freebsd.org/ports/head/security/gnupg1/distinfo
  Relative URL: ^/head/security/gnupg1/distinfo
